recommendations.title: Restore deterministic compile verification in CI and local dev
recommendations.why: Current analysis environment could not run arduino-cli, preventing entry-point compile confirmation.
actions: Install Arduino CLI in CI and developer setup scripts.
Run ci/compile-sketch.sh with FQBN=arduino:avr:nano and FQBN=arduino:avr:uno on every PR.
Fail the workflow if either target fails compilation.
acceptance_criteria: Both FQBN jobs pass on a clean checkout.
Artifacts include compiler logs for both boards.

recommendations.title: Reconcile documented dependencies with code
recommendations.why: README/INSTALL mention Servo/Wire, but current sources do not include those libraries.
actions: If not required, remove Servo/Wire from README and INSTALL dependency lists.
If required for roadmap features, add a 'future dependency' section with scope and trigger conditions.
acceptance_criteria: Dependency docs match compile-time includes in committed sources.

recommendations.title: Add pin capability guards for interrupt-backed sensors
recommendations.why: Flow and wheel sensors rely on digitalPinToInterrupt(pin_) mapping correctness.
actions: Add compile-time checks per supported board ensuring flow and wheel pins are interrupt-capable.
Add startup self-check fallback if compile-time checks cannot cover a target.
acceptance_criteria: Build fails with a clear error when invalid interrupt pins are configured.

recommendations.title: Control telemetry rate to reduce loop jitter risk
recommendations.why: Loop publishes multiple serial messages each control cycle.
actions: Publish status at a lower configurable rate than control loop frequency.
Keep control loop timing independent from telemetry throughput.
acceptance_criteria: Measured loop period remains stable under continuous telemetry consumption limits.

requirements: Correct board/port selection in IDE or CLI
